metadata.name: Link a Customer Complaint to an NCR

description: A customer complaint has been received that matches an existing internal Non-Conformance Report. The two records need to be linked.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the specific customer complaint case.

nodes.task_description: Search for and identify the related internal NCR.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the matching NCR based on the part number and defect description.

nodes.task_description: Link the two records together for complete traceability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully links the complaint to the NCR in the quality management system.
